summary.en: South Africa EV charger installations must be coordinated with the applicable distribution network, municipal electrical department, site electrical design, and grid-code or NRS practices. NRS specifications are commonly used in South Africa distribution engineering, and the South African Grid Code framework is administered under NERSA for the electricity supply industry. High-power DC chargers and sites with storage, solar PV, bidirectional charging, or demand-control functions may trigger additional grid-impact, protection, metering, and connection studies.
summary.zh: 南非电动汽车充电桩安装必须与适用的配电网络、市政电力部门、场站电气设计以及电网规范或NRS实践相协调。NRS规范通常用于南非配电工程，南非电网规范框架由NERSA在电力供应行业下管理。高功率直流充电桩以及带储能、光伏、双向充电或需求控制功能的场站，可能触发额外的电网影响、保护、计量和接入研究。
summary.zht: 南非電動汽車充電樁安裝必須與適用的配電網絡、市政電力部門、場站電氣設計以及電網規範或NRS實務相協調。NRS規範通常用於南非配電工程，南非電網規範框架由NERSA在電力供應行業下管理。高功率直流充電樁以及帶儲能、光伏、雙向充電或需求控制功能的場站，可能觸發額外的電網影響、保護、計量和接入研究。

standards_or_laws: South African Grid Code framework under NERSA
NRS distribution specifications such as NRS 097 series where applicable to embedded generation or grid-interactive installations
Municipal or utility connection approval for the installation site

summary.en: China EV charger grid evidence often assumes 50 Hz supply, China distribution-code practice, GB/T 18487 charging-system behavior, and project-specific Chinese utility acceptance. That evidence does not replace South African distribution-network review, municipal approval, or NRS/grid-code mapping.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩电网证据通常基于50 Hz供电、中国配电规范实践、GB/T 18487充电系统行为以及中国公用事业项目验收。该证据不能替代南非配电网络审查、市政批准或NRS/电网规范映射。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁電網證據通常基於50 Hz供電、中國配電規範實務、GB/T 18487充電系統行為以及中國公用事業項目驗收。該證據不能替代南非配電網絡審查、市政批准或NRS/電網規範映射。

gap.en: The gap is site-level electrical integration. Exporters should provide load profiles, harmonic and flicker data, power-quality evidence, earthing assumptions, protection settings, demand-management functions, emergency shutdown logic, and any bidirectional or embedded-generation interface evidence for the local distributor or municipality.
gap.zh: 差距在于场站级电气集成。出口商应向当地配电商或市政机构提供负荷曲线、谐波和闪烁数据、电能质量证据、接地假设、保护整定、需求管理功能、紧急停机逻辑，以及任何双向或嵌入式发电接口证据。
gap.zht: 差距在於場站級電氣集成。出口商應向當地配電商或市政機構提供負荷曲線、諧波和閃爍數據、電能質量證據、接地假設、保護整定、需求管理功能、緊急停機邏輯，以及任何雙向或嵌入式發電接口證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by the local distributor, municipality, grid code, connection agreement, embedded-generation rule, or site electrical approval; NRS specifications are applied according to the relevant connection context
mandatory_status.cn: China utility acceptance and GB/T evidence do not replace South African municipal or distributor connection approval

source.publisher: National Energy Regulator of South Africa (NERSA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat South Africa grid acceptance as a site and network approval issue. A product test report alone is not enough for high-power or grid-interactive EV charging sites.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将南非电网接纳视为场站和网络批准问题。对于高功率或与电网交互的充电场站，仅有产品检测报告并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將南非電網接納視為場站和網絡批准問題。對於高功率或與電網交互的充電場站，僅有產品檢測報告並不足夠。
